# 📈 Awesome SEO Physics

## Purpose
Enforce standards for leveraging the world's most advanced SEO resources and libraries. This skill focuses on the "Aggregator" mindset—curating top-tier SEO tools, checklists, and technical documentation to ensure the Sovereign Factory remains at the forefront of search visibility.

---

## Technique 1 — Automated Competitor Gap Analysis
- **Rule**: Never target a keyword without first analyzing the "Gap" between your content and the current top-3 ranking pages.
- **Protocol**: 
    1. Extract the semantic keywords and entity-structure from the top-ranking competitors.
    2. Identify "Missing Sentiment" or "Data Gaps" in their content.
    3. Engineer the Sovereign content to cover 100% of the competitor's topics plus at least one unique "Value Add" (e.g., proprietary data, video synthesis, or RTL localization).

---

## Technique 2 — Link-Equity & Neighborhood Mapping
- **Rule**: Build authority through "Semantic Neighborhoods" rather than generic backlinks.
- **Protocol**: 
    1. Identify high-trust domains within the specific industry vertical (e.g., PropTech, FinTech).
    2. Map the "Neighborhood" of trusted cites and ensure all outgoing links point to these authorities.
    3. Use technical SEO (Internal Linking) to distribute equity from high-traffic landing pages to deeper "Knowledge Items."

---

## 🛡️ Critical Failure Modes (Anti-Patterns)

| Anti-Pattern | Result | Correction |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Old-School Keyword Stuffing** | Manual penalty / Trust loss | Focus on "Topics" and "User Intent" rather than exact-match keyword density. |
| **Broken Link Bloat** | Crawl budget waste | Regularly audit the "Semantic Graph" and fix or redirect every 404/broken link immediately. |
| **Ignoring Search Intent** | High bounce / 0 Conversion | Match the content type (e.g., Tool, Guide, Landing Page) to the user's "Search Context" (Informational, Transactional). |

---

## Success Criteria (SEO Analytics QA)
- [ ] 10% + MoM (Month-over-Month) growth in Organic Impressions.
- [ ] Domain Authority (DA) or equivalent score shows steady upward trend.
- [ ] 100% of top-priority keywords are mapped to specific, high-density pages.
- [ ] Technical SEO audit (Ahrefs/SEMrush simulation) shows 0 critical errors.
